ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent where the country is located */,
  "population" TEXT /* Population of the country */,
  "gdp" REAL /* Gross Domestic Product (GDP) of the country */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Official currency of the country */,
  "official_language" TEXT /* Official language of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recovery_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recovery metric entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country being assessed */,
  "recovery_rating" INTEGER /* Rating of recovery (1-5 scale) */,
  "recovery_index" REAL /* Index value indicating overall recovery */,
  "recovery_index_change" REAL /* Change in recovery index percentage */,
  "severity_rating" INTEGER /* Rating of severity (1-5 scale) */,
  "severity_index" REAL /* Index value indicating severity of challenges */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "reporting_period" TEXT /* Time frame of the metrics */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of recovery (e.g., health, economy) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recovery_metrics_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recovery_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical record */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the recovery metrics entry */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date when the record was logged */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments on the entry */,
  "reported_by" INTEGER /* User who logged the entry */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the historical data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recovery_history_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES recovery_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "continents" (
  "continent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each continent */,
  "continent_name" TEXT /* Name of the continent */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region within the continent (e.g., Sub-Saharan Africa) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("continent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stakeholders" (
  "stakeholder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stakeholder */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the stakeholder organization or individual */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the stakeholder in recovery efforts */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the stakeholder */,
  "organization_type" TEXT /* Type of organization (e.g., NGO, Government) */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country associated with the stakeholder */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stakeholder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stakeholders_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interventions" (
  "intervention_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each intervention */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country where the intervention took place */,
  "stakeholder_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stakeholder responsible for the intervention */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the intervention */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the intervention */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the intervention */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the intervention */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the intervention in days */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("intervention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interventions_stakeholder_id FOREIGN KEY ("stakeholder_id") REFERENCES stakeholders ("stakeholder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interventions_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, admin) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login timestamp */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
